triggers: A user asks to review code changes, a PR, or a diff
A user requests a security audit or correctness check on specific files

block_if: Do not print full secret values
safe_defaults: Review is read-only; do not modify any files

slots.description: Which files, diff, or PR should be reviewed

evidence.quote: Identify the review target (files, diff, PR).
evidence.rationale: Agent needs to know what to review

slots.name: review_target

slots.description: Review focus: correctness, security, performance, maintainability, or API risk

evidence.quote: Analyze for the requested focus: correctness, security, performance, maintainability, or API risk.
evidence.rationale: Focus determines what findings to surface

slots.name: review_focus

slots.description: Minimum severity of findings that should be reported

evidence.quote: Report only findings that meet the severity bar.
evidence.rationale: Severity threshold controls review scope and noise

slots.name: severity_bar

activation_triggers: A user asks to review code changes, a PR, or a diff
A user requests a security audit or correctness check on specific files
execution_steps: Identify the review target (files, diff, PR).
Read the changed or specified code.
Analyze for the requested focus: correctness, security, performance, maintainability, or API risk.
Report only findings that meet the severity bar.
Cite specific file paths and line ranges as evidence.
forbidden_actions: Push, deploy, or call external services
output_requirements: Each finding: severity, file, line range, description, evidence
Optional: suggested fixes (reported separately, not applied)
safety_constraints: Review is read-only. Do not modify any files.
Only report evidence-backed findings. Do not speculate.
Do not print full secret values.
Do not push, deploy, or call external services.
